assets.name: Dyson Workplace Pension
assets.evidence: But Dyson auto-enrolled me into their scheme with Aviva. I've been contributing for about three months now, so there's probably around two thousand in there so far.

assets.name: Vanguard ISA
assets.evidence: I'm also paying into a Vanguard stocks and shares ISA — I set it up in September, putting in five hundred a month. It's worth about three thousand at the moment.

liabilities.evidence: We sold the old place and got a new mortgage with Halifax. The outstanding balance is two hundred and seventy-five thousand, fixed at four point one nine percent for five years, so it runs until 2030.
Yeah, we took out a home improvement loan with Tesco Bank — fifteen thousand over five years at six point nine percent.

income_items.evidence: I've joined Dyson as a Senior Engineering Manager. The salary is sixty-eight thousand a year, so a nice bump from what I was on before.

expense_items.evidence: We're only paying for the after-school club now, about two hundred a month.

personal_details.evidence: We moved house back in November — we're now at 28 Oakfield Road in Clifton, still Bristol, postcode BS8 4AL.
